query:
SELECT p.id as player_id, p.phone,
       pi.status, COUNT(*) as cnt, pi.source
FROM players p
LEFT JOIN playerItems pi ON pi.playerId = p.id
WHERE p.phone = '18526239983'
GROUP BY p.id, p.phone, pi.status, pi.source
ORDER BY pi.status, pi.source;
